answer:
Based on the context, Bern Venters got into a shootout after Jane’s red herd was rustled, when he tracked it and encountered two of Oldring’s rustlers. He killed one and wounded the Masked Rider, who he later discovered was a young woman named Bess. This event occurred shortly after the initial conflict with Tull and before his discovery of Surprise Valley.

\boxed{\text{After Jane's red herd was rustled, while tracking it.}}
